brief_justification: Answer 'No' is correct (6 back + 6 forward returns to origin, then 6 right displaces laterally), but no reasoning is shown — only a bare result string; No analytical depth whatsoever, just a single-word assertion with no step-by-step trace; No self-monitoring or reflection on the reasoning process is present; No verification of any kind — the agent does not check edge cases or re-examine the movement sequence; Answer is stated with complete certainty and no acknowledgment of assumptions (e.g., 2D plane, unit steps, cardinal directions); No alternative interpretations (e.g., 'facing forward' affecting relative directions) are mentioned or evaluated; The entire reasoning chain is absent — a third party cannot reproduce how 'No' was derived from the instructions.
